structured.name: Periodic Event
structured.objective: To give the Charging Station the ability to notify the CSMS periodically about monitoring events.
structured.description:
NotifyEventRequest reports every Component/Variable for which a VariableMonitoring setting
was triggered. Only the VariableMonitoring settings that are responsible for triggering an event
are included.
scenario:
1. If a periodic value has exceeded, the Charging Station sends a NotifyEventRequest with trigger
periodic to the CSMS.
2. The CSMS responds with a NotifyEventResponse.
structured.prerequisites:
The Charging Station has active monitoring settings.
The monitoring setting(s) might have been configured explicitly via a SetVariableMonitoring
message or it might be "hard-wired" in the Charging Station’s firmware.
structured.postconditions: The Charging Station notified the CSMS about the monitoring events.

requirements.precondition: When the CSMS receives an NotifyEventRequest
requirements.definition: The CSMS SHALL respond with an empty NotifyEventResponse.

requirements.precondition:
N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07
AND
The severity number of the monitor is equal to
or lower than the severity number set in the
Configuration Variable
OfflineMonitoringEventQueueingSever
ity
AND
The Charging Station is offline
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL queue this NotifyEventRequest and
deliver it when it is back online.

requirements.precondition:
N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07 AND
This NotifyEventRequest is the first or only
report part.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL set seqNo to 0.

requirements.precondition:
N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07 AND
When the variableMonitoring setting which
triggered the event is either of type Periodic or
PeriodicClockAligned
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL set trigger to Periodic.

requirements.precondition:
When there is a monitor with type Periodic on a
Component/Variable combination AND
the number of seconds specified in value have
passed (starting from the time that this monitor
was set or triggered)
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a NotifyEventRequest with
trigger Periodic for the triggered monitor.

requirements.precondition:
When there is a monitor with type
PeriodicClockAligned on a Component/Variable
combination AND
the number of seconds specified by value,
starting from the nearest clock-aligned interval
after this monitor was set, have passed (For
example, a value of 900 will trigger event notices
at 0, 15, 30 and 45 minutes after the hour, every
hour)
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a NotifyEventRequest with
trigger Periodic for the triggered monitor.

chunks.content:
# N08 - Periodic Event

**Objective:** To give the Charging Station the ability to notify the CSMS periodically about monitoring events.

**Description:** NotifyEventRequest reports every Component/Variable for which a VariableMonitoring setting
was triggered. Only the VariableMonitoring settings that are responsible for triggering an event
are included.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. If a periodic value has exceeded, the Charging Station sends a NotifyEventRequest with trigger
periodic to the CSMS.
2. The CSMS responds with a NotifyEventResponse.

**Prerequisites:** The Charging Station has active monitoring settings.
The monitoring setting(s) might have been configured explicitly via a SetVariableMonitoring
message or it might be "hard-wired" in the Charging Station’s firmware.

**Postconditions:** The Charging Station notified the CSMS about the monitoring events.

# N08 - Requirements

**N08.FR.02**
Precondition: When the CSMS receives an NotifyEventRequest
The CSMS SHALL respond with an empty NotifyEventResponse.

**N08.FR.03**
Precondition: N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07
AND
The severity number of the monitor is equal to
or lower than the severity number set in the
Configuration Variable
OfflineMonitoringEventQueueingSever
ity
AND
The Charging Station is offline
The Charging Station SHALL queue this NotifyEventRequest and
deliver it when it is back online.

**N08.FR.04**
Precondition: N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07 AND
This NotifyEventRequest is the first or only
report part.
The Charging Station SHALL set seqNo to 0.

**N08.FR.05**
Precondition: N08.FR.06 OR N08.FR.07 AND
When the variableMonitoring setting which
triggered the event is either of type Periodic or
PeriodicClockAligned
The Charging Station SHALL set trigger to Periodic.

**N08.FR.06**
Precondition: When there is a monitor with type Periodic on a
Component/Variable combination AND
the number of seconds specified in value have
passed (starting from the time that this monitor
was set or triggered)
The Charging Station SHALL send a NotifyEventRequest with
trigger Periodic for the triggered monitor.

**N08.FR.07**
Precondition: When there is a monitor with type
PeriodicClockAligned on a Component/Variable
combination AND
the number of seconds specified by value,
starting from the nearest clock-aligned interval
after this monitor was set, have passed (For
example, a value of 900 will trigger event notices
at 0, 15, 30 and 45 minutes after the hour, every
hour)
The Charging Station SHALL send a NotifyEventRequest with
trigger Periodic for the triggered monitor.
